$comment: Harness feature tracker for the fyj ops-console (Product A). Schema: .agents/skills/harness-creator/templates/feature-list.schema.json. One active feature at a time; record evidence before marking done. Long-form session notes live in progress.md; the read contract (f-132) lives in the sibling fyj_scanner repo.

features.name: P1 foundation — Workers + Neon + RLS
features.description: Drizzle tenancy schema (orgs, memberships, clients, profiles, 1:1 campaigns, campaign_matches, reports, placements, feedback, audit_log); db/policies.sql two-principal RLS core (app.* GUC readers, can_access_client/can_view_as_client, ops_app no-BYPASSRLS + ops_system); withTenant() client; read-only index client; matcher; Worker entry.
features.evidence: Merged to main via PR #1. db:generate emits drizzle/0000 (14 tables: 10 tenancy + 4 auth). npm run typecheck clean.

features.name: Index read contract — search_jobs / get_job (in fyj_scanner)
features.description: The only coupling to the job index: parameterized search_jobs(query_vec, filters jsonb) + get_job(p_job_id, p_company_id) PostgREST RPCs the Worker calls over HTTPS (src/index-client.ts). Lives in the sibling fyj_scanner repo, not here.
features.evidence: fyj_scanner PR #57 (merged). Applied to the index DB (migration add_search_jobs_and_get_job_rpcs) + verified live: filter paths correct (self-match 1.0000); get_job returns 7 camelCase keys + description; null on miss.

features.name: Auth + repository + tenant API + UI shell
features.description: Better Auth (Drizzle adapter, per-request over Hyperdrive; app-owned orgs via SECURITY DEFINER signup bootstrap); resolvePrincipal() via SECURITY DEFINER resolvers; mandatory org-scoped repository (every call -> withTenant -> RLS); Hono tenant API; Next.js web/ UI shell (Clay-inspired) with Dashboard/Clients/Client detail/Campaign matches/Members.
features.evidence: DEPLOYED + verified live 2026-06-18. Backend merged (PR #1), UI + harness + CORS merged (PR #3 -> main 4d7e0bf). LIVE: UI https://fyj-console.vercel.app (Vercel, git-auto-deploy from main, root dir web), API https://fyj-ops-console.saikiran13055.workers.dev (Cloudflare Worker). Signup verified end-to-end from the real origin: CORS 204 preflight, 200 signup, cross-site cookie (SameSite=None;Secure;Partitioned), and org + admin membership auto-created by app.bootstrap_org_for_user. ops_app non-BYPASSRLS, RLS fails closed. Added cross-origin support: hono/cors + Better Auth trustedOrigins + defaultCookieAttributes keyed off WEB_ORIGIN (src/api.ts, src/auth.ts).

features.name: Provision runtime infra + secrets
features.description: Neon project (+ vector/pgcrypto), apply schema + db/policies.sql (+ ops_app/ops_system roles), Hyperdrive/R2/KV/Queue + wrangler secrets, deploy Worker, point the Vercel app at it. See docs/INFRA-SETUP.md for the live resource names/ids and operational notes.
features.evidence: DONE 2026-06-18. Neon store 'neon-bisque-yacht' (project tiny-silence-25740582, db neondb): 14 tables, 22 RLS policies, 10 app.* fns, ops_app/ops_system roles (ops_app non-BYPASSRLS). Schema applied over Neon's HTTPS serverless driver (raw 5432 egress is blocked in CI). Cloudflare (acct 489409dba6e11499199acff6ffb8eddf): Hyperdrive 78ccefa7a3284ceebccc7fa1ceac1379, KV b6f1e38fdce3455783d0038eb62dac26, Queue fyj-match, R2 fyj-resumes; secrets BETTER_AUTH_SECRET + FYJ_INDEX_KEY set. Worker deployed. CAVEAT: ops_system is NOT BYPASSRLS (Neon owner can't grant it via SQL) — the f-135 matcher needs that resolved. SECURITY: the Neon/Cloudflare/Vercel tokens + Supabase key shared in chat must be rotated.

features.name: Clients/profiles + resume -> R2 -> embed
features.description: Assignment-scoped client CRUD (have list/create); resume upload to R2 (RESUMES bucket fyj-resumes is live); a Worker parses PDF/DOCX -> text -> embedding -> client_profiles.embedding + parsed_profile. Lights up the Jobs screen + dashboard command bar (which call search_jobs against a profile embedding). NEEDS OPENAI_API_KEY secret on the Worker (wrangler secret put). This is the ACTIVE next feature now that infra is live.
features.evidence: Implemented on branch claude/bold-cori-miypka. Backend: src/embeddings.ts (OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, 1536d, embedRaw embeds VERBATIM/newlines-preserved like jobs; embedText only for short queries), src/summarize.ts (resume → JD-style 14-field precis via gpt-4o-mini temp 0 — IDENTICAL schema/order to fyj_scanner summarize.mjs — then title+signal-block prelude like buildJobText, so the resume lands in the JOB vector distribution; mirrors scripts/embed-resume.mjs), src/resume.ts (PDF via unpdf, DOCX via fflate→document.xml, plain text; + heuristic parsedProfile), repo.getProfile/attachResume (RLS via withTenant; audits profile.embed). Routes: POST /api/clients/:id/profiles/:profileId/resume (multipart → R2 fyj-resumes → parse → embed → client_profiles.embedding+parsedProfile+embeddedAt), GET /api/profiles/:id/jobs and POST /api/search (searchAndHydrate = search_jobs + KV-cached get_job). UI: client-detail resume upload + 'View jobs' per embedded profile; real /jobs page (profile matches + ad-hoc text search, score chips); command bar wired. GATES GREEN: Worker `npm run typecheck`, `wrangler deploy --dry-run` (964 KiB gzip, unpdf/fflate bundle clean), web `npm run typecheck` + `next build` (11 routes). DEPLOY STEP REMAINING (operational, needs creds): `wrangler secret put OPENAI_API_KEY` on the Worker, then `npm run deploy`. NOT runtime-verified in-repo (no creds to deploy this session); embedText throws a clear error if the key is unset. DEPLOYED LIVE 2026-06-20: OPENAI_API_KEY set on fyj-ops-console (wrangler secret put); key independently verified (text-embedding-3-small → 1536d); Worker deployed (version ce041109). client_profiles.embedding/parsed_profile/embedded_at confirmed present in prod Neon.

features.name: Continuous campaign matcher (live)
features.description: Wire the existing matcher.ts: Cloudflare Cron enqueues active campaigns -> Queue consumer calls search_jobs (first_seen_at > last_run_at) over HTTPS -> upserts campaign_matches in Neon. Feeds the curation UI.
features.evidence: Implemented on branch claude/bold-cori-miypka. Resolved the ops_system-not-BYPASSRLS blocker via SECURITY DEFINER (chosen by user over pursuing BYPASSRLS): db/policies.sql adds app.list_active_campaigns(), app.get_campaign_for_match(uuid) (returns embedding::text — pgvector has no raw-RPC driver mapping), app.record_campaign_run(uuid, jsonb) (inserts campaign_matches on conflict (campaign_id,job_id) do nothing + bumps last_run_at atomically; org_id/client_id derived from the campaign, never the payload). All owner-owned/RLS-exempt (file already forbids FORCE RLS for exactly this), granted to ops_app+ops_system. src/matcher.ts rewritten to call these over the existing ops_app Hyperdrive connection (no second binding / no BYPASSRLS role); cron enqueues active campaigns, queue consumer matches each incrementally (since=last_run_at, targetOnly default true). GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker typecheck + db:generate unchanged + web typecheck), wrangler dry-run bundles. NOT runtime-verified (no Neon/CF creds this session): db/policies.sql must be re-applied to Neon for the new app.* fns, and the Worker redeployed, before the cron actually surfaces matches. DEPLOYED LIVE 2026-06-20: db/policies.sql applied to prod Neon via the Neon serverless WS driver (5432 is blocked in the ops container; HTTPS only) — all 3 app.* fns now exist with prosecdef=true and execute granted to ops_app+ops_system; Worker redeployed (version ce041109, cron 17 * * * * armed). Runtime-verified: non-BYPASSRLS ops_app role successfully executes app.list_active_campaigns() (0 active campaigns yet). Cron is a no-op until a campaign is activated and its profile embedded.

features.name: Client portal + feedback loop
features.description: Read-only client portal (own pipeline) + feedback insert-only (RLS already enforces both principals); feedback signal tunes target_filters.

features.name: Billing + daily digests
features.description: Usage/billing + Resend daily digest at the operator/client configured time.

features.name: Operator console — design-parity rebuild (dashboard + top navbar)
features.description: Rebuild the operator console to match the Claude Design mockup (dashboard/Operator Dashboard.html) in the PRESENT look (square corners, grayscale, Source Sans, shadcn) — adopting the design's top navbar but not its warm/mono/rounded chrome. Whole console across 4 phases: P1 dashboard analytics + navbar; P2 Explore (match review) + campaign_matches enrichment; P3 Candidates roster + Candidate profile; P4 Calendar. Backed by real data — net-new analytics here; later phases advance f-136 (tracker) / f-137 (feedback).
features.evidence: PHASE 1 done + verified in working tree (branch claude/bold-cori-fohjtb). Backend (no schema change — trends computed live from placements/campaign_matches timestamps, so no migration): db/policies.sql adds org-scoped SECURITY DEFINER analytics app.org_kpis()/org_funnel()/operator_stats()/org_trends()/org_activity(int) (read the app.org_id GUC, staff-gated, granted to ops_app — same RLS-exempt pattern as the f-135 matcher fns); src/db/repo.ts adds dashboardKpis/Funnel/Leaderboard/Trends/Activity + listApplications (all withTenant); src/api.ts adds GET /api/dashboard/{kpis,funnel,leaderboard,trends,activity} + /api/applications (isStaff guard). Frontend (present look): web/components/navbar.tsx (top navbar: brand + Dashboard/Explore/Candidates/Calendar + profile menu) replaces the icon rail in app/(app)/layout.tsx; components/topbar.tsx slimmed to a title strip (identity moved to navbar); web/components/dashboard.tsx (KpiCard/ThroughputCard/FunnelCard/ActivityCard/LeaderboardCard/ApplicationsTable + square-SVG MiniBars/Sparkline) composed into app/(app)/page.tsx; /explore + /calendar stub pages so nav resolves. GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker tsc + db:generate no-drift + web tsc) and cd web && npm run build (13 routes). NOT runtime-verified (no infra this session); db/policies.sql must be re-applied to Neon for the new app.* fns before the endpoints return data. Widgets read real tables and render graceful empty states until placements/matches exist. PHASE 2 done + verified: campaign_matches enriched (migration drizzle/0001_fair_red_hulk.sql adds fit_score, confidence (enum match_confidence), rationale, matched_skills/missing_skills/guardrails text[]); app.record_campaign_run now derives fit_score = round(clamp(score,0,1)*100) + confidence banded (>=0.82 high, >=0.64 medium, else low) at surface time (rationale/skills left null until the LLM eval pass). src/db/repo.ts: listMatches (cross-campaign, RLS-scoped via clients join, candidate/confidence filters, fit desc nulls last) + approveMatch (sets action=shortlisted, queues a placement idempotent on client+job, audits match.approve). src/api.ts: GET /api/matches (hydrates job title/company/location/url via get_job/KV) + POST /api/matches/:id/approve; decline reuses POST /api/matches/:id/action {dismissed}. web/lib/{types,api}.ts: Match/MatchConfidence/ApproveMatchResult + listMatches/approveMatch/declineMatch. web/app/(app)/explore/page.tsx replaces the stub: confidence filter + match cards (fit/confidence chips, rationale, matched/gaps skills, guardrail block disables Approve) + right detail drawer with Approve & queue / Decline. GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker tsc + db:generate no-drift + web tsc) and cd web && npm run build (13 routes, /explore 4.71kB). NOT runtime-verified; before live, apply migration 0001 + re-apply db/policies.sql to Neon (the updated app.record_campaign_run). PHASE 3 done + verified + APPLIED TO PROD: migration drizzle/0002_easy_praxagora.sql (consent_status enum; placement_status += drafted/ready_to_send/responded; clients += headline + consent_status; client_profiles += autopilot; placements += job_title/company_name/tailored_resume_name/stage_changed_at). repo: updateClient (status/headline/consent), updateProfile (autopilot/criteria), listApplications now accepts {clientId} + returns job_title/company_name, approveMatch creates the placement at status=ready_to_send + stage_changed_at. api: PATCH /api/clients/:id, GET /api/clients/:id/applications, PATCH /api/profiles/:id. web: clients/page.tsx -> candidate roster (cards: avatar, headline, status + consent chips, Add candidate); clients/[id]/page.tsx -> tabbed profile (hero + pause/resume + 3-stat row + Overview/Matches/Tracks/Applications/Activity tabs; Matches Approve/Decline; Tracks autopilot toggle + resume upload). web types/api: Client += headline/consentStatus, ClientProfile += autopilot, ApplicationRow += jobTitle/companyName; updateClient/updateProfile/listClientApplications. GATES GREEN: ./init.sh + web next build (13 routes; /clients 2.97kB, /clients/[id] 9.62kB). PROD APPLY (this session): migrations 0001+0002 + db/policies.sql applied to Neon via the @neondatabase/serverless WS driver (raw 5432 blocked here) — verified the 6 app.* fns exist, ops_app has execute, and all new columns + enum values are present; policies.sql compiling against the live schema validates the SQL functions. STILL NEEDS for the live URL: wrangler deploy (new Worker routes) + merge to main (Vercel auto-deploys web). SECURITY: neondb_owner password was shared in chat this session — ROTATE. PHASE 4 done + verified (no schema/migration — events derived from placements): repo.listCalendarEvents (maps a placement's stage to an interview/offer/call/sync event dated by stage_changed_at ?? applied_at ?? updated_at, RLS-scoped to the book) + GET /api/calendar?year=&month=. web/app/(app)/calendar/page.tsx replaces the stub: Month grid (Mon-start, today highlight, per-day event chips, day-detail panel) + Agenda list + prev/next/Today nav; types/api gain CalendarEvent + listCalendar. GATES GREEN: ./init.sh + web next build (13 routes; /calendar 3.94kB). f-139 COMPLETE — all 4 phases (Dashboard+navbar, Explore+match-enrichment, Candidates roster+profile, Calendar) on branch claude/bold-cori-fohjtb / PR #10; DB applied to prod Neon. TO GO LIVE ON THE URL: wrangler deploy (new Worker routes) + merge to main (Vercel redeploys web/).

features.name: Onboarding MVP — admin-created accounts (username/password) + client profile to design
features.description: Close public self-sign-up; admin creates the org (seed) and creates operator logins (username+password); operators add clients, onboard client profiles, and accept/decline matched jobs. Client profile screen brought to the attached operator-dashboard design.
features.evidence: Auth: Better Auth username plugin (src/auth.ts plugins:[username()]; web/lib/auth-client.ts usernameClient()); migration drizzle/0003_curious_triton.sql adds user.username UNIQUE + display_username. Public sign-up CLOSED: removed the user.create.after org-bootstrap hook; src/api.ts hard-blocks /api/auth/sign-up/* -> 403. Admin-creates-operator: POST /api/members {username,password,name?,role} (admin-gated) creates the auth user via auth.api.signUpEmail directly (off the blocked route, no admin cookie minted; synthesizes a unique non-deliverable placeholder email) then repo.addStaffMembership inserts an ACTIVE membership in the caller org (admin-write RLS authorizes; idempotent on org+user). repo.listMembers left-joins user for username/name. Seed: POST /api/seed/org-admin guarded by env ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET creates org+admin via app.bootstrap_org_for_user (exempt from session middleware like /api/auth). Env wired in worker-configuration.d.ts + .dev.vars.example + wrangler.jsonc. Web: sign-in page -> username/password only (sign-up toggle removed); members page -> Create operator form + usernames in table; web/lib/{api,types}.ts add createMember + Membership.username/name. Client profile to design (decoded from the standalone HTML gzip+base64 bundle): clients/[id]/page.tsx gains cover-band hero + overlapping 96px avatar, meta row, aggregated skill tags, 5-stat row (matches/in-flight/response%/interviews/offers), and expandable MatchRow (confidence+fit chips, guardrails, rationale, matched/gap skills) with Decline + Approve-and-queue-resume wired to existing approveMatch/declineMatch. GATES GREEN: Worker tsc + web tsc + web next build (13 routes; clients/[id] 5.37kB, members 3.84kB, sign-in 4.45kB) + db:generate no-drift. NOT runtime-verified (no infra this session): before live, apply migration 0003 to Neon, set ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET, wrangler deploy, then seed the first org+admin (docs/INFRA-SETUP.md).

features.name: End-to-end candidate value loop — LangGraph intake / enrich / tailor
features.description: Upload résumé → AI auto-extracts the candidate + targeting criteria → 20–25 ranked, explained matches surface now → operator accepts/declines → accepting tailors the master résumé (editable Markdown, client-side PDF export). LangGraph.js embedded in the Worker; hybrid LLMs (OpenAI gpt-4o-mini extraction; Claude Haiku rationale; Claude Sonnet tailoring).
features.evidence: Implemented + committed on branch claude/epic-noether-gdlasu (commit a7a2a8d). LangGraph.js embedded in the Worker via @langchain/langgraph/web (zod pinned v3 — v4 crashes the workerd runtime at init). Graphs in src/graph/: intake.ts (extract gpt-4o-mini → summarize → embed → search), enrich.ts (per-match rationale/matchedSkills/missingSkills/guardrails via Claude Haiku), tailor.ts (draft→critique→revise loop, ≤2 iterations, Sonnet draft/revise + Haiku critique); src/graph/llm.ts raw-fetch OpenAI/Anthropic helpers (Workers-safe, hasAnthropic() graceful no-op when key absent). Backend: db/policies.sql app.upsert_campaign_for_profile (SECURITY DEFINER, granted ops_app) so a UI campaign = client_profiles row + its 1:1 campaigns row; repo createProfile auto-creates the campaign; runMatchNow/applyResumeExtraction (populates headline + index-safe target_filters; dropped `families` from index filters — the index vocab zeroes results), enrichMatch, approveMatch tailoring + reports storage. api: resume route runs intake graph then enriches in waitUntil; POST /api/profiles/:id/match (on-demand); approve triggers tailoring in waitUntil; GET/PUT /api/matches/:id/resume. web: Campaigns panel (CampaignCard + Find matches), MatchRow rationale/skills/guardrails + Approve/Decline, tailored-résumé drawer (poll → edit → Save → print-to-PDF). GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker tsc + db:generate no-drift + web tsc). LIVE (2026-06-25): intake extraction + on-demand matching previously verified surfacing 25 hydrated matches with fit/confidence. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY now set as a Worker secret (version 5c974d1c, 'Secret Change' deploy over the 06:46 f-141 bundle c7cb3894) — key validated directly against both model IDs the code calls (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, claude-sonnet-4-6 both 200/OK); live Worker healthy + auth-enforced (401 unauthenticated on /api/profiles/:id/match). FULL E2E VERIFIED LIVE (2026-06-25, operator session via the API): sign in → create candidate+profile → upload résumé → intake graph extracted the candidate + surfaced 25 hydrated matches → enrichment (Phase C) populated fitScore/confidence + a real Claude-Haiku rationale + matched/missing skills + guardrails on 24/25 within seconds → approve created a placement → tailoring (Phase D) produced a claude-sonnet-4-6 tailored résumé (Markdown), GET returns status=ready, PUT operator-edit persists. BUG FOUND + FIXED during this verification (commit 79ea9f3, deployed version feff73a2): the tailor graph failed to build — LangGraph rejects a node whose name equals a state-channel key ('draft is already being used as a state attribute…'); nodes renamed write/review/revise while channels stay draft/critique. Tailoring had silently no-op'd (resume stuck status=pending) until the rename. QUALITY FINDING (not blocking, follow-up): the tailored résumé added skills NOT in the master (Next.js/React/tRPC/LLM/vector-search/OpenTelemetry/Grafana) despite the 'never fabricate' instruction — the critique→revise loop didn't catch the additions; tighten DRAFT/CRITIQUE prompts (and have critique fail on any skill not grounded in the master). TEST DATA: a candidate 'E2E Test — Jordan Rivera (f-141 verify)' + placement remain in the prod org (no delete-client endpoint). SECURITY: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + a Cloudflare API token were shared in chat this session — ROTATE both.

features.name: Tailoring anti-fabrication — ground every skill in the master résumé
features.description: Follow-up from f-141 live verification: the résumé-tailoring graph (src/graph/tailor.ts) added skills NOT present in the master résumé (e.g. Next.js, React, tRPC, LLM integration, vector search, OpenTelemetry, Grafana) despite the DRAFT_SYSTEM 'never fabricate' instruction, and the critique→revise loop did not catch it. Tighten DRAFT_SYSTEM + CRITIQUE_SYSTEM so the critique node fails (pass=false) on ANY skill/tool/employer/date not grounded in the master résumé, forcing a revise pass that strips ungrounded claims; consider passing the extracted master-skill set explicitly and having critique diff against it. Re-verify live that a backend-only résumé tailored to a full-stack JD does not invent frontend skills.

features.name: Delete candidate — endpoint + console UI
features.description: Permanently delete a candidate (client) and its whole subtree, with a console UI affordance. Admin-only, matching the existing clients_delete RLS policy.
features.evidence: Backend: src/db/repo.ts deleteClient(db, who, clientId) inside withTenant — pre-reads the row (no DELETE…RETURNING, avoiding the clients_select re-query gotcha createClient documents), collects résumé R2 keys from client_profiles, deletes the client (the client_id FKs on client_profiles/campaigns/campaign_matches/reports/placements/feedback are all ON DELETE CASCADE so the subtree goes with it; audit_log has no client FK so the trail survives), writes a client.delete audit row. src/api.ts DELETE /api/clients/:id is admin-gated (p.role==='admin' → 403 admin_only otherwise) to match the clients_delete RLS policy (admin-only), then best-effort purges R2 objects under resumes/{orgId}/{clientId}/ (object storage isn't reached by the FK cascade; failure is logged, not fatal). No schema migration and no db/policies.sql change needed — the cascade FKs and clients_delete policy already exist. Web: lib/api.ts deleteClient(id); clients/[id]/page.tsx fetches api.me() for the role and shows an admin-only red 'Delete' button in the hero (window.confirm → api.deleteClient → router.push('/clients')). GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker tsc + db:generate no-drift + web tsc) + web next build (/clients/[id] 7.46 kB). LIVE-VERIFIED (2026-06-25, deployed Worker version ff652c89): operator vamshik → 403 admin_only; admin → DELETE returned {ok:true}, after which GET /api/clients/:id = 404, matches for the client = 0 (cascade removed all 25), applications = 0 (placement cascade), and the roster no longer lists it. Used to remove the f-141 E2E test candidate. The UI Delete button ships when PR #19 merges (Vercel rebuild).

features.name: Candidate Overview — activity heatmap + agenda + edit-profile modal
features.description: Candidate profile Overview tab: a GitHub-style year activity heatmap beside a pipeline agenda, both driven by the candidate's own data; plus an 'Edit profile' affordance opening a modal with all candidate detail (name/headline/email/phone/status/consent/notes editable + campaigns & résumé read-only).
features.evidence: The two requested devl.dev registry items (year-heatmap, agenda) are mock SHOWCASE pages (the heatmap fetches the GitHub contributions API for a username; the agenda is static) and pull @coss/* registry deps + an AvatarImage/Skeleton API this project lacks — so installing them verbatim wouldn't show candidate data. Instead their visual language was adapted into data-driven components: web/components/candidate-heatmap.tsx (CandidateHeatmap — 53-week Sun→Sat grid, teal quartile scale, month/weekday labels, legend, active-days + longest/current streak stats; built from a date→count map over the candidate's matches.surfacedAt + applications appliedAt/updatedAt) and web/components/candidate-agenda.tsx (CandidateAgenda — tone-bar timeline grouped by day with lucide icons, from the candidate's applications/placements). web/components/edit-candidate-dialog.tsx (EditCandidateDialog) is a centred modal (custom overlay, Esc/scroll-lock) editing name/headline/email/phone/status/consent/notes via api.updateClient, plus a read-only campaigns + résumé-text viewer. Backend: src/db/repo.ts updateClient + src/api.ts PATCH /api/clients/:id extended to accept fullName/email/phone/notes (was status/headline/consent only); fullName non-empty validated; no schema migration (columns already exist). Web wiring: clients/[id]/page.tsx Overview renders heatmap+agenda in a 2-col grid, an 'Edit profile' (pencil) button in the hero opens the modal, onSaved updates local state; lib/api.ts updateClient input widened. GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker tsc + db:generate no-drift + web tsc) + web next build (/clients/[id] 15.6 kB). Backend LIVE-VERIFIED (2026-06-25, deployed Worker version 00099d43): admin PATCH of a throwaway candidate set fullName/headline/email/phone/status/consent/notes and GET returned all seven persisted; throwaway then deleted (no real data touched). The heatmap/agenda/modal UI ships on PR #19 merge (Vercel).

features.name: Candidate/operator onboarding flow (FUTURE)
features.description: Planned, NOT yet started — logged at the user's request as a future feature. Build a guided onboarding flow using the shadcn registry block `@blocks-so/onboarding-01` (`npx shadcn@latest add @blocks-so/onboarding-01`). Intent: a multi-step wizard for first-run setup (likely: org/operator profile → invite/create first candidate → upload résumé → review first matches), reusing the existing f-140 admin→operator→client model and the f-141 résumé-intake loop rather than introducing a parallel path. IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (from the f-141/f-144 registry experience): (1) `@blocks-so` is a custom registry namespace — before `shadcn add` works it must be added to web/components.json under `registries` (today only `@aliimam` is configured); confirm the exact registry URL template for blocks.so. (2) Inspect the fetched block first (`curl` the resolved .json) — devl.dev/blocks.so items are often mock SHOWCASE pages with hardcoded data and deps this project lacks (e.g. @coss/*, AvatarImage/Skeleton APIs we don't have); adapt the block's visual language to real data/our ui primitives instead of installing verbatim. (3) Decide entry point + gating (who sees onboarding, how completion is persisted — likely a flag on organizations/memberships or a `consent`/setup column) and whether any new API/schema is needed. Verify with ./init.sh + web next build.

features.name: Prompt caching + activity feedback panel + documents tab
features.description: Three improvements requested together: (1) Anthropic prompt caching where it pays off; (2) an operator activity-feedback panel on the candidate profile; (3) a Documents tab listing résumés + tailored résumés.
features.evidence: PROMPT CACHING: src/graph/llm.ts anthropicText/anthropicJson now accept cacheable segments (Seg = string | {text,cache?}) → cache_control:{type:ephemeral} on flagged blocks; logs usage.cache_read/creation when non-zero so wrangler tail can confirm hits. tailor.ts: unified WRITER_SYSTEM for draft+revise (both Sonnet) with a byte-stable cached prefix (candidate+master+job; breakpoint on job) and the per-call TASK appended after it, so revise reads the cache draft wrote (cache is per-model+prefix; master résumé ~4k tokens > Sonnet 2048 min); critique (Haiku) caches job+master, draft varies after. enrich.ts: candidate prefix marked cached opportunistically (only caches if system+candidate >4096 Haiku min — short résumés won't, harmless; fan-out concurrency also limits reuse). No beta header (caching is GA). FEEDBACK PANEL (f-146): db/policies.sql adds feedback_staff_insert (admin/operator, can_access_client) alongside the client-insert policy — additive, still no update/delete so feedback stays immutable; repo addStaffFeedback + listFeedback; api POST/GET /api/clients/:id/feedback (POST staff non-viewer); web Activity tab gains a Feedback panel (signal Select + note → log; lists prior feedback with tone chips). DOCUMENTS TAB: repo listDocuments (master résumés from client_profiles + tailored résumés from reports⋈campaign_matches); api GET /api/clients/:id/documents (hydrates tailored job titles via getJob) + GET /api/clients/:id/profiles/:profileId/resume-file (RLS-checked getProfile → streams the R2 object); web Documents tab — résumé cards (Open file → R2 stream) + tailored cards (open the existing TailoredResumeDrawer by matchId). GATES GREEN: ./init.sh (Worker tsc + db:generate no-drift + web tsc) + web next build (/clients/[id] 16.8 kB). LIVE-VERIFIED (2026-06-26, deployed Worker version a29006e0; feedback_staff_insert applied to prod Neon via the @neondatabase/serverless driver — pg_policies now shows feedback_client_insert + feedback_select + feedback_staff_insert): admin POST /api/clients/:id/feedback → 201 and GET returns it; GET /api/clients/:id/documents → 1 résumé + 1 tailored (hydrated title); résumé-file route streams the R2 object (200, text/plain, content-disposition, 623 bytes). PROMPT CACHING confirmed via wrangler tail across two tailoring runs within the TTL: draft #1 logged {model:claude-sonnet-4-6, write:1171, read:0}, draft #2 logged {read:1171, write:0} — full cache read of the shared prefix. UI ships on PR merge (Vercel). SECURITY: the Neon owner connection string was shared in chat to apply the policy — ROTATE it.

features.name: Candidate Overview — editable Experience & Skills sections + match/tailor robustness
features.description: Replace the Email/Phone/Status/Consent/Portal/Added detail grid (redundant with the hero status/consent chips + the edit-profile modal, and a space sink) with résumé-driven, operator-editable Experience and Skills sections under the Overview heatmap. Résumé intake (gpt-4o-mini, src/graph/intake.ts) now also extracts a structured work history (title/company/period/summary) into parsed_profile.candidate.experience; both sections render from the candidate's primary (embedded, else most recent) profile and are editable inline, persisting via PATCH /api/profiles/:id/extraction (read-merged into parsed_profile.candidate, display-only — NOT re-embedded). Empty states guide the operator to upload a résumé. Plus robustness on the two paths flagged on the live console: search_jobs/get_job now have an 8s timeout so a slow index can't hang GET /api/matches into an infinite 'Loading…'; the Matches tab now distinguishes a load failure (with Retry) from genuinely-empty; and the tailored-résumé drawer kicks tailoring on open via POST /api/matches/:id/tailor (so opening it without Approve no longer spins on nothing) and shows a precise 'no master résumé' / 'AI not configured' message instead of an endless spinner. Merged on top of f-146 (documents tab / activity feedback / prompt caching) — coexists with its Documents + Activity-Feedback panels.
features.evidence: Gates green: worker `tsc --noEmit`, web `tsc --noEmit`, web `next build`. UI driven in headless Chromium (Playwright, /api/** intercepted with canned data over the real Next app): Overview renders the new Experience (3 roles) + Skills sections and the old detail grid is gone; Experience + Skills edit modes add/remove/save via the extraction endpoint; Matches tab renders matches with fit/confidence chips; Approve → tailored-résumé drawer goes pending→ready with editable Markdown + Save/Download; a no-résumé candidate shows the clear blocked message instead of spinning. Merged with f-146; re-ran gates post-merge. Backend changes (extraction endpoint, intake experience, index timeouts, tailor endpoint) require a Worker deploy to take effect on the live URL; UI ships on PR merge (Vercel). LIVE FOLLOW-UP (2026-06-26, operator login): the reported 'no matches' was a real bug, not an empty candidate — an embedded profile surfaced 0 because its target_filters carried seniority:['mid'], which zeroes the index search (same controlled-vocab mismatch as families; dropping it → 25 matches). Fixed by removing seniority from index filters in intake.toFilters + applyResumeExtraction and defensively dropping it in matcher.ts + the match route. Remediated the live candidate (25 matches now surfaced). Worker deploy still pending for future uploads/cron + the rest of the f-147 backend.

features.name: Hybrid retrieval + Voyage rerank-2.5 + soft signals on the match path
features.description: Replace dense-only matching with the validated pipeline on every profile-matching entrypoint: hybrid retrieve (dense + lexical, RRF) via the new search_jobs_hybrid index RPC (f-148) -> Voyage rerank-2.5 (src/rerank.ts, NON-FATAL) -> soft adjust (seniority band + comp floor) -> top-K. New src/match.ts orchestrator (matchProfile) is the single path for intake (graph search node), on-demand /api/profiles/:id/match, the display /api/profiles/:id/jobs, and the background matcher. compFloor/families/seniority are stripped from the hard filters and applied as SOFT signals instead (comp-floor penalty never punishes null comp; seniority compared by coarse band so `mid` no longer zeroes results). Hard filters kept to closed_at + targetOnly + opt-in remote + since. department/employment_type/industry remain embedding-only (already true via buildJobText + the summary precis). db/policies.sql: get_campaign_for_match also returns resume_text + parsed_profile (so the matcher can build the rerank/lexical queries); record_campaign_run accepts optional fitScore/confidence/guardrails (falls back to cosine-derived). No Drizzle schema change — reuses campaign_matches.fit_score/confidence/guardrails + parsed_profile.{summary,candidate.skills}.
features.evidence: Gates green via ./init.sh: Worker `tsc --noEmit` clean, `db:generate` -> 'No schema changes, nothing to migrate' (confirms no table migration — reused existing columns + parsed_profile jsonb), web `tsc --noEmit` clean. New: src/rerank.ts (Voyage rerank-2.5, contract proven in fyj_scanner/scripts/voyage-vs-openai.mjs, non-fatal fallback), src/match.ts (matchProfile + seniorityBand + soft adjust). Wired: src/graph/intake.ts (search node), src/api.ts (/api/profiles/:id/match + /api/profiles/:id/jobs), src/matcher.ts. db/policies.sql functions extended (drop+recreate get_campaign_for_match for the new OUT cols; record_campaign_run optional rerank fields). VOYAGE_API_KEY added to worker-configuration.d.ts + .dev.vars.example. DEPLOYED TO PROD 2026-06-29: fyj_scanner f-148 RPC applied to the index (verified HTTP 200 via PostgREST); Voyage rerank-2.5 key validated; `wrangler secret put VOYAGE_API_KEY` set; `wrangler deploy` succeeded (version cdca2802-353b-4b56-90c0-47f674770b50, https://fyj-ops-console.saikiran13055.workers.dev, hourly cron + fyj-match queue live, all bindings resolved). Worker boots (auth-gated routes respond). Neon functions APPLIED + verified 2026-06-29 (surgically, via @neondatabase/serverless HTTPS driver — raw psql/TCP blocked by sandbox): app.get_campaign_for_match now returns resume_text + parsed_profile, app.record_campaign_run accepts optional fitScore/confidence/guardrails, grants re-applied. Index + Worker + Neon now mutually consistent; the background matcher has its rerank/lexical inputs. End-to-end VERIFIED in prod 2026-06-29 via operator login (vamshik): GET /api/profiles/:id/jobs returned 25 reranked hydrated hits ordered by Voyage relevance (fitScore not monotonic in RRF score => reranker active), POST /api/profiles/:id/match surfaced=25.

features.name: Explore = general NL job search; Review queue; admin-role resolution hardening
features.description: (1) The Explore tab was the candidate match-review queue; repurposed it to a GENERAL natural-language job-search surface over the whole index (web/app/(app)/explore/page.tsx -> api.searchJobs -> /api/search). The match-review queue (approve/decline across the book) moved to a new /review route + nav item so nothing is lost. (2) Hardened resolvePrincipal: a multi-membership staff user now defaults to their HIGHEST-privilege role (admin>operator>viewer) with a stable tiebreak, instead of the oldest-org role (which, with unstable created_at ties, could flip admin->operator between requests).
features.evidence: Gates green: Worker `tsc --noEmit`, web `tsc --noEmit`, web `next build` (both /explore and /review routes compiled). Worker DEPLOYED (version 9aadc58b-d852-4a38-b7a7-4ba0978f95b5); admin login verified to resolve role=admin via /api/me post-deploy. Web changes (Explore/Review/navbar) ship via Vercel on push/merge. NOTE on the reported admin->operator switch: on live Neon the `admin` account has a SINGLE admin membership, so the server resolves admin consistently (re-verified) — the resolvePrincipal change is latent-bug prevention; the reported symptom looks client/session-side (e.g. a lingering operator session in the same browser) and needs a repro to pin.

features.name: Explore browse-by-default + reranked search; match dedup; delete track
features.description: Explore polish + two fixes. (1) Explore now BROWSES the newest postings by default (no query) via a new index RPC recent_jobs(filters) -> /api/jobs/recent; a query runs hybrid+rerank search. Dropped candidate-fit framing (no % match chip / rationale) — it's job discovery, not candidate scoring. (2) /api/search rewired through the SAME hybrid (dense+lexical RRF) + Voyage rerank pipeline as candidate matching (query doubles as lexical-arm + rerank query), then hydrates. (3) repo.listMatches dedups by (clientId, jobId) so two similar tracks don't show the same job multiple times in the candidate matches tab / review queue. (4) Delete-track: repo.deleteProfile + DELETE /api/profiles/:id (RLS client_profiles staff-write + cascade) + a Delete button on the CampaignCard.
features.evidence: Index: recent_jobs RPC applied to Supabase mwcpoaefmggapztkxakp (migration f151_recent_jobs). Worker DEPLOYED (version ce8cb40a-331a-4608-bc38-babdc136c504) + verified live via admin session: /api/jobs/recent returns newest postings (first_seen desc); /api/search returns 25 reranked hits (Senior Data Engineer roles top for a data-eng query); DELETE /api/profiles/<bogus> -> 404 (route live, RLS-safe). Gates: Worker tsc, web tsc, web next build all green. Web (Explore browse/search + delete button) ships via Vercel.

features.name: Embeddings: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small -> Voyage voyage-4-large (1024d)
features.description: Swap the embedding model on BOTH sides of the profile<->job cosine match (must stay in lockstep, per src/embeddings.ts's own invariant). fyj_scanner (job index, sibling repo): src/embeddings.mjs now calls Voyage voyage-4-large (input_type=document, output_dimension=1024) instead of OpenAI; supabase/schema.sql migrates jobs.embedding 1536d->1024d (guarded DO block on current column dimension so re-running schema.sql is a no-op after the first apply), nulls existing embedding/embedding_model/embedded_at (hard cutover — old vectors can't cast to the new dimension), drops+recreates the HNSW index. ops-console (this repo): src/embeddings.ts calls Voyage instead of OpenAI, reusing the existing VOYAGE_API_KEY secret (no new secret) — embedRaw (resume intake) uses input_type=document (mirrors jobs.buildJobText's shape, per summarize.ts's existing doctrine), embedText (command-bar NL query) uses input_type=query, Voyage's asymmetric-retrieval pairing. src/db/schema.ts embedding column -> vector(1024); drizzle migration 0004_pale_guardian.sql nulls existing client_profiles.embedding/embedding_model/embedded_at before the ALTER (same hard-cutover reasoning). OPENAI_API_KEY is UNCHANGED and still required for gpt-4o-mini intake extraction (graph/llm.ts) and résumé summarization (summarize.ts) — only the embedding call moved providers.
features.evidence: Code done in both repos; DB migrations APPLIED LIVE this session; Worker deploy still pending. fyj_scanner: applied directly to Supabase mwcpoaefmggapztkxakp via migration f152_jobs_embedding_voyage_4_large_1024d — jobs.embedding is now vector(1024) (verified via pg_attribute), old embeddings nulled, HNSW index rebuilt. Hit an undocumented blocker: view public.v_jobs_enriched (SELECT j.*, jd.description ... FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN job_descriptions jd) depends on jobs.embedding and isn't in schema.sql at all — captured its live definition via pg_get_viewdef, dropped it, ran the migration, recreated it verbatim, and added drop+recreate to schema.sql so re-running the file stays idempotent. Confirmed search_jobs_hybrid queries public.jobs directly (not the view), so it's unaffected; grants on the recreated view match Supabase's default anon/authenticated/service_role/postgres set. Of 341,349 total job rows only 8,772 had ANY embedding before this change (OpenAI backfill was never finished), so the real blast radius was those 8,772 rows. STILL OPEN: fyj_scanner/.env has no VOYAGE_API_KEY yet, so `npm run embed-backfill` hasn't run — dense/hybrid search currently returns 0 rows (soft-degrades, doesn't error) until it does. Also confirmed (broader than first thought) that job_descriptions the table itself, plus the 4 RPCs from the earlier finding, are ALSO missing from schema.sql — flagged for the schema-drift reconciliation task, already spawned as a separate session. ops-console: applied drizzle/0004_pale_guardian.sql + db/policies.sql directly to live Neon via the owner role (neondb_owner — confirmed via pg_roles that the runtime `ops_app` role, which the user initially supplied, lacks CREATEROLE/ownership and cannot run either file); client_profiles.embedding confirmed vector(1024) live (3 rows, all nulled by the hard cutover). `npm run typecheck` + `npm run db:generate` green (no drift). NOT YET deployed: `wrangler deploy` blocked in this sandbox (wrangler 4.x needs Node >=22; sandbox has 20.15.1, no version manager) — user opted to run `npm run deploy` themselves rather than have a portable Node 22 fetched. SECURITY: user pasted a Neon owner password, a Cloudflare API token, and a Supabase secret key directly in chat this session to unblock this — flagged for rotation, per the standing 'rotate every credential pasted in chat' note in docs/INFRA-SETUP.md. CLOSED OUT (same session, continued): user provided VOYAGE_API_KEY + asked to scope the backfill to summarized jobs only (EMBED_SUMMARIZED_ONLY=1) rather than all 168k active jobs — search_jobs_hybrid's lexical arm ALSO only indexes title+description_summary, so unsummarized jobs have no lexical signal either; scoping to the 5,617 already-summarized jobs keeps dense+lexical coverage consistent rather than partially covering the other ~162k with noisier raw-description embeddings. First backfill run crashed: scripts/backfill-embeddings.mjs's select still referenced jobs.description, which no longer exists on jobs (moved to job_descriptions at some undocumented point) — fixed by fetching job_descriptions separately in chunks of 200 job_id and merging by id (no FK for PostgREST to embed the join). Second run crashed differently: embedTexts() returned `data.embeddings` per the docs summary I'd fetched earlier, but Voyage's ACTUAL response is OpenAI-shaped (`{data:[{embedding,index}],usage}`) — verified by a raw curl-equivalent fetch; fixed in BOTH src/embeddings.mjs (fyj_scanner) and src/embeddings.ts (ops-console, same bug, not yet deployed at the time so caught before it shipped) to read `data.data[].embedding` sorted by index. Third run: 5,617/5,617 embedded, 0 failed, 148s, $0 (within Voyage's free tier). User then asked to update Node system-wide + deploy: uninstalled the pinned `OpenJS.NodeJS.20` winget package, installed `OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS` (24.18.0) via `winget install --source winget` (had to pin the source — msstore hit a TLS cert error under this machine's Norton MITM setup that winget has no override for, unlike Node's NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS). `npm run deploy` succeeded — version `e5da98cb-25e3-4481-a5e8-eb20144e90e0`, live at https://fyj-ops-console.saikiran13055.workers.dev, confirmed healthy (GET /api/health -> 401 unauthenticated, not a crash). FULLY LIVE as of this session: Neon client_profiles.embedding vector(1024), Supabase jobs.embedding vector(1024) with 5,617 embedded jobs, ops-console Worker deployed on the new code. STILL OPEN: (1) rotate the Neon owner password, Cloudflare token, and Supabase key pasted in chat this session; (2) optionally run the full (unscoped) backfill later if broader dense-search coverage over unsummarized jobs is wanted; (3) re-verify end-to-end with a live résumé upload once there's a reason to (not done this session — no test candidate action taken).
